feat(E1C-S04): tag management — global rename & delete (#86)

* feat(E1C-S04): add tag management — global rename & delete

Add "Manage Tags" button near topic filters that opens a slide-out panel
showing all tags alphabetically with course counts. Supports:
- Rename tag with inline editing (Enter confirms)
- Delete tag with confirmation dialog
- Merge detection when renaming to an existing tag name
- Empty state when no tags exist
- Automatic filter refresh after mutations

Acceptance criteria:
- AC1: "Manage Tags" button near topic filters
- AC2: Rename with pre-filled input, Enter confirms, courses updated
- AC3: Delete with confirmation prompt, removes from all courses
- AC4: Rename to existing → merge with confirmation message
- AC5: Empty state message when no tags

commit.message:
fix: Douyin switch to 作品管理 page + fix all eval escaping

1. Douyin: use /content/manage (作品管理) instead of data center 投稿列表.
   作品管理 shows all 78 posts (vs 10 in data center) with views/likes/
   comments/saves/shares. Infinite scroll loads ~12 in background tabs
   (Chrome CDP IntersectionObserver limitation in background tabs).

2. ALL cdpEval JS expressions: convert template literals with regex to
   [...].join() string arrays. Template literal escaping corrupted \d,\s,\n
   in regex patterns causing SyntaxError in Chrome eval context.
   Replace \d with [0-9], \s with [ ], \n with String.fromCharCode(10).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Drop encroachment column from data table

Domain boundary already established in 5.1. Per-row encroachment
numbers add nothing if all points are inside the domain.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(adapters): flexible middle layer — model catalog, config, profiles, factory

Problem: adapters were hardcoded. Bedrock only worked for Anthropic Claude.
No way to reuse connection configs or discover available models.

Changes
───────
model_catalog.py (new)
  - ModelSpec dataclass: context_window, cost, rate limits, capabilities,
    aliases, tags
  - MODEL_CATALOG with 46 models across 7 providers (OpenAI 7, Anthropic 5,
    Bedrock 13, Ollama 11, Gemini 4, Mistral 4, Azure 2)
  - BedrockModelFamily enum + get_bedrock_family() — detects family from
    model ID prefix (anthropic / meta_llama / mistral / amazon_titan /
    cohere / ai21)
  - get_model(), list_models(), resolve_alias(), search_models() helpers

adapter_config.py (new)
  - AdapterConfig dataclass with 13 typed fields
  - from_spec() parses "provider/model[@url_or_region][#profile]":
      openai/gpt-4o
      ollama/llama3:8b@http://192.168.1.1:11434
      bedrock/meta.llama3-70b-instruct-v1:0@us-west-2
      azure/gpt-4o#my-prod-profile
  - from_dict() coerces + validates raw dicts from YAML/CLI
  - to_provider_config() converts to per-adapter from_config() format

profiles.py (new)
  - ConnectionProfile + ProfileManager
  - 3-path search: ./redforge.profiles.yaml → ~/.redforge/profiles.yaml
    → $REDFORGE_PROFILES env var
  - YAML format with description, tags, all AdapterConfig fields
  - Gracefully handles missing/malformed files, never raises

factory.py (new)
  - AdapterFactory.from_spec()   — spec string → adapter
  - AdapterFactory.from_profile() — named profile → adapter
  - AdapterFactory.from_config()  — AdapterConfig → adapter
  - AdapterFactory.from_dict()    — raw dict → adapter
  - AdapterFactory.register()     — plug in custom adapter class
  - AdapterFactory.health_check() — timed probe, HealthCheckResult
  - AdapterFactory.detect_available() — Ollama API check + env var scan
    + boto3 credential check → list[AvailableModel]

bedrock_adapter.py (complete rewrite)
  - Routes to correct request body per model family:
      Anthropic → Messages API with anthropic_version
      Meta Llama → <|begin_of_text|> prompt format
      Mistral    → <s>[INST] prompt format
      Titan      → inputText + textGenerationConfig
      Cohere     → message + chat_history
      AI21 Jamba → OpenAI-style messages array
  - Per-family response extraction
  - send_streaming() via invoke_model_with_response_stream

__init__.py (updated)
  - Exports AdapterFactory, AdapterConfig, ModelSpec, ConnectionProfile,
    ProfileManager, MODEL_CATALOG, get_model, list_models, search_models,
    HealthCheckResult, AvailableModel
  - get_adapter() kept as backward-compat shim

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: extract BaseDomainProcessor and consolidate lexicon loaders

DRY refactoring — 353 net lines removed, no behavior change.

I_extraction: create I00_base_domain_processor.py with BaseDomainProcessor(ABC)
containing shared __init__, process_all(), _extract_entity(). I03-I07 now
only define domain_name, call_type, and _entity_configs().

C22_lexicon_loaders: extract 3 generic helpers (_register_entity_term,
_load_abbrev_regex_lexicon, _load_abbrev_regex_with_ids_lexicon) to
eliminate ~90 lines of duplicated registration code across 10 methods.

perf(eval): compile regexes at module level, cache config lookups, extract shared normalization

F04_disease_matcher: move 10 regexes from inside hot-path functions to
module-level compiled constants, extract _MIN_TOKEN_OVERLAP_COUNT and
_TOKEN_OVERLAP_RATIO config lookups, add _normalize_disease_text() shared
helper to deduplicate normalization in disease_matches() and
_disease_match_level().

J03_graph_export: add exc_info=True to 8 bare except blocks for better
debugging tracebacks.

commit.message:
fix: add Vite dedupe for @almadar/ui to prevent duplicate EventBusContext

Without dedupe, Vite serves separate module instances for each @almadar/ui
subpath import, causing duplicate React contexts. Events emitted on one
bus instance are invisible to listeners on the other.

commit.message:
fix: replace broken Kilo composite action refs with CLI invocations (#167)

GitHub Actions resolves all `uses:` references at job setup time, even
for steps skipped by `if` conditions. The Kilo-Org/kilocode/github
composite action was failing to resolve, breaking the entire workflow.

_run-agent.yml: inlined all provider steps from the remote composite
action (Ven0m0/.github/actions/run-agent-prompt) directly into the
reusable workflow. Kilo now installs via CLI instead of composite action.

check-updates.yml: replaced both Kilo-Org/kilocode/github@latest
references with CLI install + `kilo github run` invocations.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01CcX3R1auksCWs4EDD3eYsN

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix GitHub Actions build: add PySide6 hidden imports, use Windows MCI for sound

- Install dependencies directly instead of requirements.txt (simpleaudio optional)
- Add EXE verification step
- Rename output to SchoolBellScheduler.exe

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: v0.2 — bug fixes, streaming pipeline, new features and profiles

Bug fixes:
- dedup: flush all copies when count ≤ threshold (was silently dropping lines 2-N)
- filter: sample_info=0 now means "drop all" (was "keep all")
- --explain: stage and reason fields now properly attributed per stage

New features:
- --context N: keep N lines before/after each ERROR/WARN via ring buffer
- --tail N: process only last N lines using a ring buffer (O(N) memory)
- --since / --until: time-bounded filtering via ISO timestamp comparison
- --nonconseq-dedup: frequency-map dedup across whole output with time-range annotations
- --follow: live tail with filtering, handles log rotation (file size shrinkage)
- Color TTY output: ERROR=red, WARN=yellow, dedup annotations=dim gray (isatty check)

Architecture:
- Stage trait (push/flush) in stages/mod.rs implemented by all five stages
- pipeline::run_reader<R: BufRead> for true streaming (one line through all stages)
- pipeline::follow_file / follow_stdin for --follow mode
- profile::Profile now derives Clone (required for owned ProfileStage)

New profiles (bundled):
- mongodb.yml: noise=connections/heartbeats, signal=SocketException/OOM/shutdown
- nginx.yml: noise=2xx/3xx, signal=4xx/5xx/upstream errors
- gc.yml: noise=minor GC, signal=Full GC/OOM/promotion failure
- elasticsearch.yml: noise=cluster state/routing, signal=shard failure/RED/OOM

Probe:
- Detects Nginx/Apache access logs (HTTP method + status pattern heuristic)
- Detects Elasticsearch ([o.e.] namespace marker)

All 16 existing tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: 4 CDP collection bugs — XHS followers, 近30日, TikTok parser, scroll-all

Root causes found and fixed:

1. XHS followers: was using 主页访客数 (592) as followers. Fix: visit
   creator center home page first, extract real 粉丝数 (151).

2. XHS 近30日: click "近30日" button before extracting analytics data.

3. TikTok 0 posts: TIKTOK_CONTENT_JS parser expected adjacent lines but
   TikTok puts each value on a separate line with tab lines between.
   Rewritten to filter tab/empty lines before parsing.

4. Scroll-all: add scrollUntilStable() helper that scrolls repeatedly
   until page content stops growing. Applied to all 3 platforms.

CRITICAL FIX: All cdpEval JS expressions converted from template literals
to [...].join() string arrays. Template literal escaping was corrupting
regex patterns (\d, \s, \n) causing "Uncaught" SyntaxError in Chrome.

Verified: Douyin 10 posts, TikTok 6 posts, XHS 10 posts (real views).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix: Community 투표 — runTransaction → batch write 전환으로 precondition 충돌 근본 해결

runTransaction은 tx.get 후 tx.set 시 currentDocument.updateTime 선행조건을
추가해 재시도 시 failed-precondition 반복 발생.
batch.set은 선행조건 없이 무조건 덮어쓰기하므로 충돌 없음.
voteRef.get()으로 이전 투표 먼저 확인 후 batch.commit() 으로 원자 처리.
community.js v13 → v14

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Auto-update skills on package version change

Skills now update automatically when dobbe is upgraded. A version marker
file (~/.claude/skills/.dobbe-skill-version) tracks which package version
installed the skills. On each run, if the marker doesn't match the current
__version__, all skills are force-reinstalled. No user action needed.

Flow:
  pip install dobbe==0.6.0  (new version)
  dobbe vuln scan           (first command after upgrade)
    → marker says "0.5.0", package is "0.6.0" → mismatch
    → force=True → all 30 skills reinstalled with new content
    → marker updated to "0.6.0"
    → subsequent runs skip (versions match)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add audit log + failures reporter, auto-generated after every scan

Every scan now writes 3 files to the output directory automatically:

  redforge_{sid}_{ts}.json          — existing session summary
  redforge_{sid}_{ts}_audit.jsonl   — NEW: full audit log
  redforge_{sid}_{ts}_failures.json — NEW: failures-only for guardrail work

audit.jsonl (JSONL — one JSON object per line):
  - session_start entry: provider, model, config, session_id
  - probe_result entry per probe: full payload + sha256, full model response
    + sha256, score, verdict, evidence, OWASP/MITRE metadata, tags
  - session_end entry: timing, score summary, per-OWASP breakdown
  Written with 0600 permissions. Never exposed via REST API.

failures.json (only emitted when failures exist):
  - scan_summary: total failures, by-severity counts, by-OWASP counts
  - failures[]: each failed probe with full attack payload, full model response,
    and guardrail improvement block containing:
      - input_detection_patterns extracted from payload
      - output_detection_patterns extracted from response
      - yara_rule_template: drop-in dict ready for YARAScanner.add_rule()
      - similarity_reference: ready for SimilarityDetector.add_reference()
      - recommended_action: BLOCK / WARN / FLAG
  - guardrail_summary: input_scanner_gaps, output_scanner_gaps,
    top-3 priority actions sorted by severity

Both reporters skip file creation when store_results=False.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: handle sshd_config.d/ overriding SSH hardening settings

cloud-init等工具会在sshd_config.d/下生成配置文件（如50-cloud-init.conf），
其中的PasswordAuthentication yes会因OpenSSH的first-match-wins规则覆盖主配置，
导致SSH加固失效。现在do_ssh_harden()会同步修改sshd_config.d/下的冲突配置，
_get_ssh_port()也会优先从sshd_config.d/读取端口。

commit.message:
fix: rewrite homepage to pure inline styles — eliminates Tailwind v4 cascade issues

Tailwind v4 CSS Cascade Layers cause base styles to override utility classes
on the homepage cards (link underlines, font sizes, etc.). Replaced all
Tailwind className usage on page.tsx with inline styles. Also uses
auto-fill grid for responsive card layout without breakpoint classes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add OS Landscape Survey as Phase 0 of Agent 5 Strategist

- Auto-categorize 227 OS entries into 7 families + Other bucket:
  Windows (70), RHEL/Clone (32), Debian/Ubuntu (24), SUSE (19),
  Legacy Unix (23), BSD & VMS (14), Apple (14), Other (31)
- New landscape survey step with checkboxes before policy chat
- "Other" flow: AI verifies if OS is already tracked under a different
  name or is genuinely new; if new, triggers Agent 1 to fetch lifecycle
  data, then returns to survey to re-categorize
- Progress stepper updated: Landscape → Policy Chat → Principles →
  Cost Intel → Analysis → Complete
- Landscape context passed to policy conversation for context-aware advice

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: RFC-001 add project_init as link event alongside project_set

Both project_set and project_init establish session × project links.
Three queue producers: hook, project_set, project_init.
